description: 3-month cross-sectional trend-momentum. Signal = 200-day SMA slope over 63 sessions (sma200_slope_63); top-15 by cross-sectional rank.
universe: PIT index-membership-masked Nifty-500, restricted to large+mid (trailing rolling-median 20d rupee ADV >= 5cr) and solvent low-debt (0 <= D/E < 1.5).
params_derived_through: 2017-01-01 (stop/target/trailing/hold/sizing derived on the pre-2017 train slice; frozen thereafter)
provenance: long_horizon/results/cpcv_long_horizon_final_682.json — 682-name corrected universe; params re-derived per fold in the walk-forward and confirmed stable.

live_overlays._note: Applied by long_horizon_cron to the paper-book sizing equity. NOT part of the frozen `cfg` block (load_frozen_cfg returns `cfg` only), so the research backtest baselines + golden master are unaffected. The backtest VALIDATED the vol-target via pre-reg 0068 (arm V2, the best-Calmar arm); the live scanner applies the IDENTICAL shared formula (portfolio.vol_target_scalar) to the trailing paper-portfolio equity (results/portfolio_history.csv). Shipped 2026-06-26 to the paper path; remove this block or set vol_target_annual=0 to disable.
live_overlays.provenance: pre-reg 0068 V2 (target_vol 0.15 / floor 0.40); CAGR-neutral DD reduction (~-45 -> -39 in-backtest); 0070 confirmed sizing/market-state overlays plateau ~-38 (a dependable -30 needs the deferred tail hedge).

expected_portfolio_metrics.note: HONEST reproducible anchor = baseline_v0 (2026-06-27): the FROZEN cfg run through the research harness on the corrected-682 universe (397 solvent names, 2017-2026), current exit-parity-unified engine. See research/baseline_v0.json. The prior 30.3% / 1.15 was the OPTIMISTIC target-fill figure (pre exit-parity unification; STRATEGY_FULL section 6 flagged it needed CPCV re-confirmation); baseline_v0 IS that re-confirmation (exit-parity costs ~4pp; after-tax STCG a further ~3pp). Stage-B survivorship re-derivation will produce baseline_v1, likely lower. NOT live-validated.

prior_optimistic_headline.note: pre exit-parity fix; superseded by baseline_v0 2026-06-27
